title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Convert IPv4 octets and masks between binary and dotted decimal and explain contiguous prefix bits.
Identify RFC1918, APIPA, loopback, unspecified, limited broadcast, multicast, and public addressing behavior.
Calculate network address, broadcast address, usable host range, prefix length, and address count for CIDR blocks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
